name: Space Opera Rebellion
description: Preset Space Opera Rebellion with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: A small crew ignites rebellion against a galactic regime.
text_areas.setting: Core worlds, fringe colonies, and contested hyperspace routes.
text_areas.main_objective: Disrupt regime infrastructure and rally neutral systems.
text_areas.stakes: Failure cements authoritarian control for generations.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
